changed: Bait status 'N/A' button label changed from 'None' to 'N/A' for clarity
Admin reports page: bait status badge now shows 'N/A' instead of 'None' for replaced/missing stations
Admin edit page: station summary now shows 'N/A' instead of raw 'none' for bait status
PDF bait status summary table now includes a 'None (N/A)' row when any stations were replaced/missing
Chemicals section in station form now greys out and disables for N/A bait status (not just Clean)

changelog.notes: Refinements to bait status N/A — improved labels, PDF summary row, and chemicals section lockout

added: Bait status now includes 'N/A' (None) option for stations that were replaced or are missing — previously users were forced to select an inapplicable status
Selecting station condition 'Missing' automatically sets bait status to N/A
Selecting N/A bait status automatically clears all chemicals (not applicable for replaced/missing stations)
PDF report: bait station rows now display 'N/A' instead of raw value for N/A bait status
Admin edit page: N/A option added to bait status dropdown with contextual info message
Bait status summary in PDF correctly tracks and counts N/A stations

changelog.notes: Added N/A bait status option for replaced/missing bait stations

fixed: PCO dashboard: declined_reports_count now correctly counts reports with status 'declined' (was incorrectly counting draft reports with admin notes)
PCO dashboard: draft_reports_count now correctly counts all reports with status 'draft' (was excluding drafts that had admin notes)
Bait station condition 'needs_repair' is now normalized to 'needs repair' before DB insert/update to match MySQL ENUM definition, preventing silent empty-string storage
PDF insect monitoring: new monitor indicator column now correctly reads is_new_addition field from DB (was reading undefined is_new field)
removed: Removed leftover test marker console.log and test_marker response field from PCO dashboard controller

changelog.notes: Bug fix release — PCO dashboard stat corrections, bait station condition ENUM normalization, PDF new monitor indicator fix

added: PDF report: Insect monitoring section now renders both Light Traps and Box Monitors as separate subsections with type-appropriate columns
PDF report: Glue board summary table at bottom of insect monitoring section (light traps × 2, box monitors × 1)
PDF report: Light trap status now displays human-readable values (Good / Faulty with type / N/A) instead of raw DB values
PDF report: Tubes replaced column added to light traps table
changed: PDF generation timeout reduced from 120s to 60s with proper timeout error detection and partial file cleanup
fixed: Update modal no longer appears on every app load in development mode or when version is not yet embedded
Service worker no longer force-reloads all clients on activation, preventing interference with the update flow
PDF temp HTML file is now always cleaned up after generation (previously leaked on PHP failure)
PDF insect monitoring: box monitors were previously silently dropped and never rendered

changelog.notes: PDF report improvements for insect monitoring section, versioning stability fixes, and PDF service reliability improvements

added: Lucide Bug icon for notification badge - perfect branding for pest control notifications
fixed: Push notifications on Android now display client name correctly (was showing 'undefined')
Push notifications now use proper monochrome badge for Android status bar (fixes white square issue)

changelog.notes: Critical bug fixes for push notifications on Android devices - proper status bar icon implementation

fixed: Offline sync now retries indefinitely until successful (never deletes unsynced reports)
Duplicate report detection now handles HTTP 409 responses correctly
Added 30-second timeout to API calls to prevent infinite loading states
Network connectivity verification before sync attempts

changelog.notes: Enhanced offline reliability and data safety - reports are never deleted if unsynced

fixed: Version control infinite loop issue - update modal now properly refreshes to new version
removed: Automatic report data prefill from previous report (will be re-enabled via settings panel in future update)

fixed: Bait stations now display in correct numeric order (1, 2, 3... 20, 21) instead of alphabetical order (1, 11, 12... 2, 20, 21) on reports

changelog.notes: Bug fix release - Corrected bait station sorting in PDF reports and report displays

added: Complete admin portal with client, user, and assignment management
PCO mobile-friendly portal with offline sync capabilities
Automated report generation with PDF export functionality
Email notification system for report delivery and status updates
Push notifications for real-time assignment updates
Bait station and equipment tracking system
Chemical inventory management with L-number tracking
Batch number management for fumigation reports
Draft reports feature for incomplete inspections
Client self-assignment portal for direct booking
Comprehensive audit trails for all system activities
Service worker for offline functionality
security: JWT-based authentication with secure token management
SQL injection prevention with parameterized queries

changelog.notes: Initial production release - Full system deployment with all core features
